name: olio.pictureBookCharacterStub
description: Minimal client-supplied character hint for PictureBookUtil.createFromScenes — name/gender/role only. Deliberately does not carry appearance/outfit/portraitPrompt: those are dead weight (createCharPerson never reads them in production) and omitting appearance is what makes the per-character LLM enrichment call fire and build real detail from the source text instead.
